affected_pattern: Widespread NULL TotalCharges across the region served by mediation cluster 3
root_cause: Kafka broker disk-full on the billing record-ingest cluster — producer writes began failing silently because acks=1 with retries=0 dropped messages; the NULLs propagated downstream with no raised error.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Kafka Disk-Full Silent Drop pattern
Broker disk-usage crossed 100% 10 minutes before the loss window
Producer config acks=1 retries=0 captured in runtime config dump
recommended_action: Grow disk / prune retention on the affected broker
Change producer to acks=all retries=10 with idempotent producer
Replay from upstream raw billing record archive
Alert on broker disk-usage > 80% with auto-scale runbook
